--- Document: ./documents/flintstone_api.json ---
api_name:
  Flintstone API
version:
  2.1.0
description:
  The comprehensive API for managing prehistoric Bedrock operations, citizens, and resources
base_url:
  https://api.bedrock.stone
authentication:
  type:
    stone_token
  header:
    X-Stone-Token
  description:
    Carved stone tokens required for all API access. Tokens expire every yabba-dabba-doo cycle.
rate_limits:
  standard:
    100 requests per mammoth hour
  premium:
    500 requests per mammoth hour
  enterprise:
    Unlimited (powered by Brontosaurus)
endpoints:
  citizens:
    /api/v2/citizens:
      GET:
        description:
          Get all citizens of Bedrock
        parameters:
          family:
            string (optional) - Filter by family name (Flintstone, Rubble, etc.)
          occupation:
            string (optional) - Filter by job (quarry_worker, dinosaur_crane_operator, etc.)
          neighborhood:
            string (optional) - Filter by area

Rubble, etc.)
          occupation:
            string (optional) - Filter by job (quarry_worker, dinosaur_crane_operator, etc.)
          neighborhood:
            string (optional) - Filter by area (cobblestone_lane, granite_street, etc.)
          limit:
            integer (optional) - Max 100 per request
          offset:
            integer (optional) - For pagination
        response_example:
          citizens:
            id:
              FRED001
            name:
              Fred Flintstone
            family:
              Flintstone
            occupation:
              Quarry Worker
            address:
              301 Cobblestone Way
            spouse:
              Wilma Flintstone
            children:
              - Pebbles Flintstone
            pet:
              Dino
            catchphrase:
              Yabba-Dabba-Doo!
            bowling_average:
              165.4
            created_at:
              Stone Age Year 2
            status:

Dino
            catchphrase:
              Yabba-Dabba-Doo!
            bowling_average:
              165.4
            created_at:
              Stone Age Year 2
            status:
              active
          total_count:
            47
          pagination:
            limit:
              20
            offset:
              0
            has_more:
              True
      POST:
        description:
          Register a new citizen in Bedrock
        required_fields:
          - name
          - occupation
          - address
        request_example:
          name:
            Bamm-Bamm Rubble
          family:
            Rubble
          occupation:
            Strong Baby
          address:
            303 Cobblestone Way
          special_abilities:
            - Super strength
            - Rock lifting
    /api/v2/citizens/{citizen_id}:
      GET:
        description:
          Get detailed information about a specific citizen
        path_parameters:

er strength
            - Rock lifting
    /api/v2/citizens/{citizen_id}:
      GET:
        description:
          Get detailed information about a specific citizen
        path_parameters:
          citizen_id:
            string - Unique citizen identifier (e.g., FRED001)
      PUT:
        description:
          Update citizen information
        note:
          Only the citizen themselves or clan chief can update
      DELETE:
        description:
          Remove citizen from Bedrock registry
        warning:
          This action cannot be undone - citizen will be exiled to the Land of the Lost
  dinosaurs:
    /api/v2/dinosaurs:
      GET:
        description:
          List all working dinosaurs in Bedrock
        parameters:
          species:
            string (optional) - brontosaurus, stegosaurus, pterodactyl, triceratops
          job_type:
            string (optional) - construction, transportation, entertainment, pet
          availability:
            boolean

) - brontosaurus, stegosaurus, pterodactyl, triceratops
          job_type:
            string (optional) - construction, transportation, entertainment, pet
          availability:
            boolean (optional) - Filter available dinosaurs
          size:
            string (optional) - small, medium, large, colossal
        response_example:
          dinosaurs:
            id:
              DINO001
            name:
              Dino
            species:
              Snorkasaurus
            owner:
              Fred Flintstone
            job_type:
              pet
            special_skills:
              - Barking
              - Knocking over Fred
              - Licking faces
            size:
              medium
            diet:
              Rocks and bones
            temperament:
              Friendly
            availability:
              False
            last_checkup:
              Stone Age Year 5, Mammoth Month 3
      POST:
        description:

temperament:
              Friendly
            availability:
              False
            last_checkup:
              Stone Age Year 5, Mammoth Month 3
      POST:
        description:
          Register a new working dinosaur
        required_fields:
          - name
          - species
          - owner
          - job_type
    /api/v2/dinosaurs/rental:
      POST:
        description:
          Rent a dinosaur for temporary work
        pricing:
          construction_dinosaur:
            50 clams per day
          transportation_dinosaur:
            30 clams per day
          entertainment_dinosaur:
            75 clams per day
        request_example:
          species:
            brontosaurus
          rental_duration_days:
            7
          job_type:
            construction
          project_location:
            Slate Rock and Gravel Company
          insurance_required:
            True
  businesses:
    /api/v2/businesses:
      GET:
        description:

truction
          project_location:
            Slate Rock and Gravel Company
          insurance_required:
            True
  businesses:
    /api/v2/businesses:
      GET:
        description:
          Get all businesses operating in Bedrock
        parameters:
          industry:
            string (optional) - quarrying, dining, entertainment, retail
          status:
            string (optional) - active, seasonal, closed
          owner:
            string (optional) - Filter by business owner
        response_example:
          businesses:
            id:
              BIZ001
            name:
              Slate Rock and Gravel Company
            industry:
              quarrying
            owner:
              Mr. Slate
            address:
              Industrial Boulder District
            employees:
              - Fred Flintstone
              - Barney Rubble
            products:
              - Granite slabs
              - Limestone blocks
              - Marble

istrict
            employees:
              - Fred Flintstone
              - Barney Rubble
            products:
              - Granite slabs
              - Limestone blocks
              - Marble chips
            operating_hours:
              Dawn to Dusk
            safety_record:
              3 mammoth-years without incidents
            status:
              active
    /api/v2/businesses/{business_id}/employees:
      GET:
        description:
          Get all employees of a specific business
      POST:
        description:
          Hire a new employee
        requirements:
          citizen_id:
            Must be registered Bedrock citizen
          background_check:
            No saber-tooth tiger incidents
          references:
            At least 2 clan member references
  transportation:
    /api/v2/vehicles:
      GET:
        description:
          List all stone-age vehicles available for use
        vehicle_types:
          - foot_car
          - mammoth_bus

ces
  transportation:
    /api/v2/vehicles:
      GET:
        description:
          List all stone-age vehicles available for use
        vehicle_types:
          - foot_car
          - mammoth_bus
          - pterodactyl_air
          - brontosaurus_crane
          - stone_motorcycle
        response_example:
          vehicles:
            id:
              VEH001
            type:
              foot_car
            model:
              Flintstone Family Cruiser
            owner:
              Fred Flintstone
            passenger_capacity:
              4
            fuel_type:
              Leg power
            top_speed:
              25 mph (downhill with tailwind)
            features:
              - Rock radio
              - Stone steering wheel
              - Mammoth fur seats
            maintenance_schedule:
              Oil feet weekly
            insurance_status:
              Covered by Bedrock Mutual
    /api/v2/transportation/routes:
      GET:

th fur seats
            maintenance_schedule:
              Oil feet weekly
            insurance_status:
              Covered by Bedrock Mutual
    /api/v2/transportation/routes:
      GET:
        description:
          Get available transportation routes in Bedrock
        response_example:
          routes:
            id:
              ROUTE001
            name:
              Downtown Cobblestone Express
            stops:
              - Flintstone House
              - Rubble House
              - Bedrock Mall
              - Slate Rock and Gravel Co.
              - Bowling Alley
            schedule:
              Every 30 minutes during daylight
            fare:
              2 clams per trip
            operated_by:
              Bedrock Transportation Authority
  entertainment:
    /api/v2/events:
      GET:
        description:
          Get upcoming entertainment events in Bedrock
        parameters:
          event_type:
            string (optional) - bowling,

rtainment:
    /api/v2/events:
      GET:
        description:
          Get upcoming entertainment events in Bedrock
        parameters:
          event_type:
            string (optional) - bowling, drive_in_movie, concert, sports
          date_range:
            string (optional) - today, this_week, this_month
          venue:
            string (optional) - Filter by venue name
        response_example:
          events:
            id:
              EVT001
            name:
              Bedrock Bowling Championship
            type:
              bowling
            venue:
              Bedrock Bowl
            date:
              Stone Age Year 5, Dino Month 15
            time:
              After sunset
            participants:
              - Fred Flintstone
              - Barney Rubble
              - Frank Frankstone
            prizes:
              - Golden Bowling Ball
              - 50 clams
              - Lifetime supply of Brontosaurus burgers

- Barney Rubble
              - Frank Frankstone
            prizes:
              - Golden Bowling Ball
              - 50 clams
              - Lifetime supply of Brontosaurus burgers
            admission:
              5 clams
            dress_code:
              Cave formal
    /api/v2/drive-in:
      GET:
        description:
          Get current and upcoming movies at the Bedrock Drive-In
        response_example:
          now_showing:
            title:
              The Flintstones in Viva Rock Vegas
            genre:
              Comedy/Romance
            rating:
              Suitable for all cave ages
            runtime:
              90 stone minutes
            showtimes:
              - Sunset
              - Late Night
            admission:
              3 clams per car
            concessions:
              - Brontosaurus burgers
              - Pterodactyl wings
              - Rock candy
  utilities:
    /api/v2/utilities/power:
      GET:

3 clams per car
            concessions:
              - Brontosaurus burgers
              - Pterodactyl wings
              - Rock candy
  utilities:
    /api/v2/utilities/power:
      GET:
        description:
          Check power grid status (dinosaur-powered)
        response_example:
          grid_status:
            operational
          power_sources:
            type:
              Brontosaurus Generator
            capacity:
              500 stone-watts
            efficiency:
              High when well-fed
            maintenance:
              Daily grooming required
          current_load:
            450 stone-watts
          estimated_downtime:
            Lunch break: 12-1 PM daily
      POST:
        description:
          Request new power connection
        requirements:
          property_address:
            Valid Bedrock address
          usage_estimate:
            Expected stone-watt consumption
          deposit:
            50 clams (refundable)

quirements:
          property_address:
            Valid Bedrock address
          usage_estimate:
            Expected stone-watt consumption
          deposit:
            50 clams (refundable)
    /api/v2/utilities/water:
      GET:
        description:
          Check water system status
        response_example:
          water_quality:
            Crystal clear spring water
          source:
            Natural rock springs
          distribution_method:
            Woolly mammoth delivery trucks
          service_areas:
            - Cobblestone Way
            - Granite Street
            - Limestone Lane
          emergency_contact:
            Bedrock Water Works - Call 'WATER' on shell phone
  emergency:
    /api/v2/emergency/fire:
      POST:
        description:
          Report fire emergency
        emergency_contact:
          Bedrock Fire Department
        response_time:
          5 minutes (dinosaur-powered fire truck)
        equipment:
          - Stone ladders

port fire emergency
        emergency_contact:
          Bedrock Fire Department
        response_time:
          5 minutes (dinosaur-powered fire truck)
        equipment:
          - Stone ladders
          - Water-squirting dinosaurs
          - Rescue pterodactyls
        request_example:
          location:
            301 Cobblestone Way
          fire_type:
            Cave fire
          severity:
            major
          people_trapped:
            False
          caller_name:
            Fred Flintstone
          callback_shell_number:
            BEDROCK-FIRE
    /api/v2/emergency/police:
      POST:
        description:
          Report crime or request police assistance
        response_example:
          incident_id:
            CRIME001
          status:
            Dispatched
          responding_officer:
            Officer Slate
          estimated_arrival:
            10 stone minutes
          case_number:
            BR-2024-001
  weather:

:
            Dispatched
          responding_officer:
            Officer Slate
          estimated_arrival:
            10 stone minutes
          case_number:
            BR-2024-001
  weather:
    /api/v2/weather/current:
      GET:
        description:
          Get current weather conditions in Bedrock
        response_example:
          temperature:
            75 cave degrees
          conditions:
            Sunny with occasional pterodactyl clouds
          wind:
            Light breeze from the tar pits
          humidity:
            Comfortably dry
          visibility:
            Clear to the next mountain
          uv_index:
            Dinosaur-safe levels
          air_quality:
            Fresh stone air
    /api/v2/weather/forecast:
      GET:
        description:
          Get weather forecast for upcoming days
        parameters:
          days:
            integer (1-7) - Number of days to forecast
        response_example:
          forecast:

n:
          Get weather forecast for upcoming days
        parameters:
          days:
            integer (1-7) - Number of days to forecast
        response_example:
          forecast:
            date:
              Tomorrow
            temperature_high:
              80 cave degrees
            temperature_low:
              60 cave degrees
            conditions:
              Partly cloudy with chance of meteor showers
            precipitation:
              10% chance of rock rain
error_codes:
  400:
    Bad Request - Check your stone tablet formatting
  401:
    Unauthorized - Invalid or expired stone token
  403:
    Forbidden - Insufficient clan privileges
  404:
    Not Found - Resource vanished like a dinosaur
  429:
    Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded, try again after mammoth hour
  500:
    Internal Server Error - Volcano erupted in our data cave
  503:
    Service Unavailable - Dinosaurs are on strike
response_formats:
  success:
    status:
      success

ter mammoth hour
  500:
    Internal Server Error - Volcano erupted in our data cave
  503:
    Service Unavailable - Dinosaurs are on strike
response_formats:
  success:
    status:
      success
    data:
      ...
    timestamp:
      Stone Age timestamp
    api_version:
      2.1.0
  error:
    status:
      error
    error_code:
      404
    message:
      Resource not found in Bedrock database
    timestamp:
      Stone Age timestamp
    help_url:
      https://docs.bedrock.stone/errors
pagination:
  default_limit:
    20
  max_limit:
    100
  parameters:
    limit:
      Number of results per page
    offset:
      Number of results to skip
    has_more:
      Boolean indicating if more results exist
changelog:
  2.1.0:
    date:
      Stone Age Year 5
    changes:
      - Added dinosaur rental endpoints
      - Improved error handling for pterodactyl network outages
      - Added weather forecasting powered by woolly mammoth meteorologists
      - Enhanced security with

dded dinosaur rental endpoints
      - Improved error handling for pterodactyl network outages
      - Added weather forecasting powered by woolly mammoth meteorologists
      - Enhanced security with carved stone token authentication
  2.0.0:
    date:
      Stone Age Year 4
    changes:
      - Major API redesign with RESTful stone principles
      - Added real-time event notifications via smoke signals
      - Implemented rate limiting to prevent mammoth overload
      - Added support for multi-family queries
contact:
  support:
    Send smoke signal to Bedrock API Support
  documentation:
    https://docs.bedrock.stone
  community:
    Bedrock Developer Cave Paintings
  emergency:
    Hit rocks together three times
--- End of ./documents/flintstone_api.json ---

--- Document: ./documents/flintstone_api2.json ---
api_name:
  Bedrock Citizens Management API
version:
  3.0.1
description:
  Alternative documentation for Bedrock citizen management system - Updated protocols
base_url:

nts/flintstone_api2.json ---
api_name:
  Bedrock Citizens Management API
version:
  3.0.1
description:
  Alternative documentation for Bedrock citizen management system - Updated protocols
base_url:
  https://citizens.bedrock.gov
authentication:
  type:
    mammoth_key
  header:
    Authorization
  description:
    Bearer tokens carved on mammoth tusks. Required format: 'Bearer MAMMOTH_[token]'
endpoints:
  citizens:
    /citizens/v3/residents:
      GET:
        description:
          Retrieve all registered residents of Bedrock (UPDATED ENDPOINT)
        parameters:
          surname:
            string (required) - Family surname filter
          job:
            string (optional) - Employment filter
          district:
            string (optional) - Residential district
          page_size:
            integer (optional) - Max 50 per request (changed from 100)
          page_number:
            integer (optional) - Page number for results
        response_example:

page_size:
            integer (optional) - Max 50 per request (changed from 100)
          page_number:
            integer (optional) - Page number for results
        response_example:
          residents:
            resident_id:
              RES_FRED_001
            full_name:
              Frederick J. Flintstone
            surname:
              Flintstone
            employment:
              Senior Quarry Operator
            home_address:
              301 Cobblestone Way, Bedrock
            marital_status:
              Married to Wilma
            dependents:
              name:
                Pebbles Flintstone
              relationship:
                daughter
              age:
                toddler
            household_pet:
              name:
                Dino
              species:
                Snorkasaurus
              registration_number:
                PET_001
            famous_saying:
              Yabba-Dabba-Doo!
            bowling_score:

ino
              species:
                Snorkasaurus
              registration_number:
                PET_001
            famous_saying:
              Yabba-Dabba-Doo!
            bowling_score:
              165
            registration_date:
              Year 2 of Stone Age
            account_status:
              verified
          total_residents:
            47
          page_info:
            page_size:
              20
            current_page:
              1
            total_pages:
              3
            has_next_page:
              True
      POST:
        description:
          Register new resident in Bedrock system
        required_fields:
          - full_name
          - surname
          - employment
          - home_address
          - district
        authentication_required:
          mammoth_key with ADMIN_WRITE permissions
        request_example:
          full_name:
            Bamm-Bamm Rubble Jr.
          surname:
            Rubble

thentication_required:
          mammoth_key with ADMIN_WRITE permissions
        request_example:
          full_name:
            Bamm-Bamm Rubble Jr.
          surname:
            Rubble
          employment:
            Professional Strong Baby
          home_address:
            303 Cobblestone Way
          district:
            Cobblestone District
          special_notes:
            Exceptionally strong for age
          emergency_contact:
            Barney Rubble
    /citizens/v3/lookup/{resident_id}:
      GET:
        description:
          Get comprehensive resident profile by ID (DIFFERENT PATH)
        path_parameters:
          resident_id:
            string - Format: RES_[NAME]_[NUMBER] (e.g., RES_FRED_001)
        headers_required:
          Authorization:
            Bearer MAMMOTH_[token]
          X-District-Code:
            Required district verification code
        response_example:
          resident_profile:
            basic_info:

Bearer MAMMOTH_[token]
          X-District-Code:
            Required district verification code
        response_example:
          resident_profile:
            basic_info:
              resident_id:
                RES_FRED_001
              full_name:
                Frederick J. Flintstone
              preferred_name:
                Fred
              birth_year:
                Unknown (Stone Age records incomplete)
            contact_details:
              primary_address:
                301 Cobblestone Way
              postal_district:
                CBST-001
              shell_phone:
                BEDROCK-301
              smoke_signal_code:
                THREE-LONG-TWO-SHORT
            employment_record:
              current_job:
                Senior Quarry Operator
              employer:
                Slate Rock and Gravel Company
              years_employed:
                8
              salary_range:
                500-750 clams annually

uarry Operator
              employer:
                Slate Rock and Gravel Company
              years_employed:
                8
              salary_range:
                500-750 clams annually
              performance_rating:
                Satisfactory (occasional tardiness noted)
            family_structure:
              spouse:
                name:
                  Wilma Slaghoopal Flintstone
                maiden_name:
                  Slaghoopal
                resident_id:
                  RES_WILMA_001
              children:
                name:
                  Pebbles Flintstone
                resident_id:
                  RES_PEBBLES_001
                school:
                  Bedrock Elementary Stone School
      PUT:
        description:
          Update resident information (ADMIN ONLY)
        authorization:
          Requires DISTRICT_ADMIN or CHIEF_MAMMOTH_KEEPER permissions
        note:
          Only authorized personnel can modify resident

ate resident information (ADMIN ONLY)
        authorization:
          Requires DISTRICT_ADMIN or CHIEF_MAMMOTH_KEEPER permissions
        note:
          Only authorized personnel can modify resident records
      DELETE:
        description:
          Archive resident record (does not actually delete)
        warning:
          Resident will be marked as 'relocated to Granite City' - reversible action
    /citizens/v3/search:
      POST:
        description:
          Advanced search for residents (NEW ENDPOINT)
        request_example:
          search_criteria:
            name_contains:
              Flint
            employment_sector:
              quarrying
            has_pets:
              True
            bowling_average_min:
              150
            district:
              Cobblestone
          sort_options:
            sort_by:
              registration_date
            sort_order:
              descending
          return_fields:
            - resident_id

Cobblestone
          sort_options:
            sort_by:
              registration_date
            sort_order:
              descending
          return_fields:
            - resident_id
            - full_name
            - employment
            - bowling_score
        response_example:
          search_results:
            resident_id:
              RES_FRED_001
            full_name:
              Frederick J. Flintstone
            employment:
              Senior Quarry Operator
            bowling_score:
              165
            match_score:
              0.95
          result_count:
            1
          search_time_ms:
            250
          cached_result:
            False
authentication_details:
  token_format:
    MAMMOTH_[32_character_hex]
  token_expiration:
    72 mammoth hours (3 days)
  refresh_required:
    True
  permissions:
    READ_BASIC:
      View public resident information
    READ_DETAILED:
      View full resident profiles
    ADMIN_WRITE:

72 mammoth hours (3 days)
  refresh_required:
    True
  permissions:
    READ_BASIC:
      View public resident information
    READ_DETAILED:
      View full resident profiles
    ADMIN_WRITE:
      Create and modify resident records
    DISTRICT_ADMIN:
      Full access within specific district
    CHIEF_MAMMOTH_KEEPER:
      System-wide administrative access
rate_limits:
  standard_user:
    50 requests per mammoth hour
  verified_business:
    200 requests per mammoth hour
  government_access:
    1000 requests per mammoth hour
  emergency_services:
    Unlimited (priority routing)
error_responses:
  authentication_errors:
    401:
      code:
        MAMMOTH_TOKEN_INVALID
      message:
        Mammoth tusk authentication failed
      action_required:
        Obtain new mammoth token from District Office
    403:
      code:
        INSUFFICIENT_MAMMOTH_PERMISSIONS
      message:
        Your mammoth clearance level is insufficient
      action_required:
        Contact

moth token from District Office
    403:
      code:
        INSUFFICIENT_MAMMOTH_PERMISSIONS
      message:
        Your mammoth clearance level is insufficient
      action_required:
        Contact District Administrator for permission upgrade
  data_errors:
    404:
      code:
        RESIDENT_NOT_IN_CAVE_SYSTEM
      message:
        Resident record not found in cave database
      suggestion:
        Check resident_id format: RES_[NAME]_[NUMBER]
    422:
      code:
        INVALID_DISTRICT_CODE
      message:
        Provided district code does not match resident location
      action_required:
        Verify X-District-Code header value
data_formats:
  resident_id_format:
    RES_[UPPERCASE_NAME]_[3_DIGIT_NUMBER]
  date_format:
    Stone Age Year [number], [season_name] [day]
  address_format:
    [number] [street_name], [district], Bedrock
  phone_format:
    [AREA_CODE]-[3_DIGIT_EXTENSION]
important_notes:
  breaking_changes_v3:
    - Endpoint paths changed from /api/v2/ to

ddress_format:
    [number] [street_name], [district], Bedrock
  phone_format:
    [AREA_CODE]-[3_DIGIT_EXTENSION]
important_notes:
  breaking_changes_v3:
    - Endpoint paths changed from /api/v2/ to /citizens/v3/
    - Authentication switched from stone_token to mammoth_key format
    - Response field names updated (citizens -> residents, id -> resident_id)
    - Pagination changed from offset-based to page-based
    - Rate limits reduced for standard users
  migration_guide:
    https://citizens.bedrock.gov/docs/v3-migration
